name: Shaker Honey Almond Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first five dry ingredients.
2. Melt shortening and add to them both sugars.
3. Beat eggs until fluffy; add honey and sour cream, then add the butter sugar mixture to them, stirring vigorously.
4. Gradually stir in the dry ingredients.
5. Pour batter into a buttered and floured 9-inch cake tin, 2 inches deep. Cover the top with almonds.
6. Bake at 375°F for about 45 minutes, or until done.
7. Remove from pan to a cake rack and cool.
8. Store in a tightly closed container for at least 2 days. It will keep for weeks.
